$schema_doc: Output template for agent-quality. skill_name identifies the target skill. run_number matches the run-[n] directory. test_input is the exact prompt used for both agents. vanilla_prompt is the synthesised plain-prose instruction given to Agent A. vanilla_output and skill_output are full verbatim completions. scoring has three dimensions each scored 1-10; null means the agent failed to return output for that run. recommendation is one of: skill_better, marginal, opus_alone_better. recommendation_grade is the display emoji + label. recommendation_rationale is a single paragraph.
